case_title: ROMAN LI VS. HOWARD JOSEPH LEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD,  JOSEPH LEE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,743.00 FILED BY LI, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD,  JOSEPH LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD,  JOSEPH LEE HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: PER CURRENT TENANT WHO REFUSED TO IDENTIFY SELF TO DEPUTIES, THEY NEVER HEARD OF DEFENDANT JOSEPH LEE HOWARD. HE HASN'T LIVE THEIR SINCE THEY MOVED IN FOR 1 PLUS YEAR. (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD,  JOSEPH LEE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR ROMAN LI IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA (#301252). DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR HOWARD JOSEPH LEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, ROMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD,  JOSEPH LEE $856.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $946.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ROMAN LI IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER YANINA GOTSULSKY. DEFENDANT HOWARD JOSEPH LEE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
